audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass allows free admission to the museum for up to 9 people per day. As of Feb 1, 2026, this pass will admit up to 5 people per day. This is a printable pass. You must be able to print this pass at home or present it on a mobile device at the museum.

coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass allows free admission to the museum for up to 9 people per day. As of Feb 1, 2026, this pass will admit up to 5 people per day. This is a printable pass. You must be able to print this pass at home or present it on a mobile device at the museum.
